title: Designating the Addl. DG as Nodal Officer under the CoS Rules,2011
description: Designating the Addl. DG as Nodal Officer under the CoS Rules,2011
text: F, NO.I-34/1/2009-O&M Government of India Ministry of Statistics and Programme Implementation Saraar Patel Bhawar:, Sansad Marg, New Deihi - 110 001. Dated: 9th June 2011. ORDER Consequent upon the Notification of the Collection of Statistics Rules, 2011 under the Collection of Statistics Act, 2008 (7 of 2009) and designating the Addl. DG of Coordination and Publication Division of the Central Statistics Office as the Nodal Officer under sub-rule (1) of rule 3 of the Rules, it has been decided that administering the Act and the Rules and related work shall be handled by the Coordination and Publication Division of the Central Statistics Office. 2. This order will come into immediate effect. (Arvind Kumar) Joint Secretary (Admn.) Copy to: 1. AIIADGsoftheMOSPI 2. All DDGs of the MOSPI 3. Director (BSC)/ Director (ISS)/ Director (Fin.)/ Director (MPLADS)/ Dy. Secretray (SSS)/ Director (TPP)/ JA (IPMD) 4. US (SD)/ US (YV)/ US (SKM)/ US (RM)/ US (GK)/ US (KV)/ US (SM) 5. NSC Secretariat 6. Admn. 1/ General Section/ Admn.III Section 7. Computer Centre with a request to place it on the web-site of this Ministry 8. Database Cell, ISS 9. Hindi Section for Hindi Version Copy also forwarded for information to: 1. PS to Hon'ble MOS (IC) 2. Sr. PPS to Secretary, MOSPI 3. PStoDG, CSO 4. PStoDG, NSSO 5. PS to AS, MOSPI 6. PS to AS & FA 7. PS to JS (Admn.) (Arvind Kumar) Joint Secretary (Admn.) -- 1 of 1 --
